description_long: This is a compact, military-style folding shovel with a robust, dark green metal blade and a reinforced, straight handle. The blade is triangular with a pointed tip and features a serrated edge on one side, suitable for cutting or sawing. The handle is cylindrical, covered with textured black rubber grips at both ends for secure handling, and appears to be telescopic or collapsible for portability. The central shaft is metallic, likely steel, with a matte olive finish, and the connection between the blade and handle is reinforced with a visible locking mechanism. The shovel's overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, focusing on durability and functionality. There are no visible brand markings or mounting holes, and the object appears clean and unused.
description: A compact, military-style folding shovel with a pointed, serrated metal blade and a straight, rubber-gripped handle. The design is utilitarian and robust, with a matte green and black finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full blade with its pointed tip and serrated edge, as well as the straight, rubber-gripped handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the serrated edge, with the handle's cylindrical shape and grip texture visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blade and the handle, with the locking mechanism and shaft details more apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blade's profile and serrated edge, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical handle with black rubber grips at both ends; appears telescopic or collapsible; made of metal and rubber.
attribute_blade_type: Triangular, pointed blade with a serrated edge on one side; made of metal with a matte finish.
